title: Sustainability & Climate Data Analyst
description: Analyzes environmental/sustainability metrics, generates climate-related insights to guide sustainable policies and actions.
requirements: Master’s/Bachelor’s in Environmental Studies, Data Science, or related field
Strong data analysis and visualization skills (Python, R, GIS)
Familiarity with sustainability metrics and reporting frameworks (e.g., GHG accounting, SDGs)
Statistical modeling or climate impact assessment experience
benefits: Health coverage and professional growth support

title: Ethical Hacker
description: Performs vulnerability assessments, penetration testing, and security audits to safeguard systems.
requirements: Degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related field
Experience in network/app security tools (e.g., Metasploit, Burp Suite)
Knowledge of security frameworks and compliance standards (ISO 27001, OWASP)
benefits: Comprehensive training programs and global certifications
Exposure to large enterprise client projects

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Builds and maintains scalable ML pipelines, automates model deployment, ensures reliability of AI systems.
requirements: Degree in Computer Science, AI, or related field
Proficiency in ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch) and CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
Monitoring and logging tools (Prometheus, ELK stack)
benefits: Access to cutting-edge AI projects and tools
Health insurance and flexible work models

title: Generative Ai Engineer
description: Designs and deploys generative AI systems (e.g., text, image, voice generation), integrates them into client solutions.
requirements: Degree in AI/ML, Computer Science, or equivalent
Exprience with genartive models(transformers, diffusion model)
Familiarity with frameworks (Hugging face, OenAI API, PyTach/TensorFlow)
Knowledge of depoyment in production(API, scalability, monitoring)
Undestand of ethical AI and bise mitigation
benefits: Industry-leading training programs and global exposure
Flexible work arrangements and global project opportunities

title: Cybersecurity Specialist
description: Manages cybersecurity operations, incident response, threat detection, and implements security controls.
requirements: Degree in Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or related field
Certifications like CISSP, CISM, or CEH
Knowledge of SIEM tools (Splunk, QRadar), firewalls, IDS/IPS
Skills in forensic analysis and incident response
Understanding of regulatory compliance (ISO 27001, GDPR, PCI DSS)
benefits: Global project exposure and remote/hybrid work flexibility
